block.llmera.intelligent_transmitter.too: The _core_ of an intelligent network. Stores the model endpoint, model name, API key, and system prompt, then gathers nearby bound tools and skills into context the AI can read.
Opens the _configuration interface_ for local or remote large language models.
With a burning Blaze Burner nearby
Brings the network _online_. R-click the adjacent Blaze Burner to open _AI Conversation_ and let the model inspect tools, skills, and containers.
When R-Clicked with a Tool Link Station or Skill Board
_Binds_ the held item to this intelligent network. Once placed, it becomes a visible node the AI can inspect or invoke.
block.llmera.tool_link_station.tooltip.s: An _actuator_ for the intelligent network. Place it above a target block to let AI inspect containers, emit redstone, or write Create Sequenced Gearshift programs.
block.llmera.tool_link_station.tooltip.b: Exposes the target container's _NBT and item contents_ to the AI for inventory inspection.
block.llmera.tool_link_station.tooltip.c: When placed above a Sequenced Gearshift
block.llmera.tool_link_station.tooltip.b: Allows AI to write _angle_, _distance_, _delay_, or _await pulse_ steps into the gearshift program in order.
block.llmera.tool_link_station.tooltip.c: When invoked through the redstone interface
block.llmera.tool_link_station.tooltip.b: Emits a 0-15 redstone signal from the _Tool Link Station itself_, powering adjacent redstone machinery.
block.llmera.skill_board.tooltip.summary: A _skill note_ for the intelligent network. Stores reusable goals, constraints, and ordered steps so the AI can understand a workflow before acting.
block.llmera.skill_board.tooltip.behavio: Edits the _skill name_, _description_, and `|` separated steps. When enabled, these lines appear as skills in AI context.
block.llmera.skill_board.tooltip.conditi: When bound to an intelligent network
block.llmera.skill_board.tooltip.behavio: Acts as an _operation manual_ for nearby tool calls, reducing wrong tool names, target blocks, or redstone interface usage.
screen.llmera.conversation.empty: No response yet. Type a message below.
tooltip.llmera.network.bind_hint: Right-click an Intelligent Transmitter to bind
